note_confirmation_title: Turn on audio sharing to enable automatic note taking
note_confirmation_content:
To allow TekTIME to capture and transcribe your meeting audio, click the Continue button to select the audio sharing option for the tab where the audio is coming from to analyze.
👉 This allows us to automatically generate your notes, without any effort on your part.

⚠️ Note: Audio recording may not work correctly on Safari and Firefox. We recommend using Chrome or Edge for the best experience.
recording_error: Please ensure that your browser has permission to access the microphone and allow audio sharing from the selected tab

hero.title: Control of deadlines and <br class="d-none d-md-block" /> real-time project management
hero.title1: Meet all your deadlines, <br class="d-none d-md-block" /> budget and mental load
hero.title2: Take your clients on a first-class journey <br class="d-none d-md-block" /> through controlled collaboration
hero.title3: Easily share your <br class="d-none d-md-block" /> expertise
hero.title4: Finish all your meetings <br class="d-none d-md-block" /> on time
hero.title5: Structure the organization <br class="d-none d-md-block" /> of your business
hero.subtitle: For each of your business issues
hero.description: Wake up to inbox zen: replies perfectly drafted, tasks handled, emails organized and your AI chief of staff on call 24/7.

whatisTektime.subtitle: Welcome to TekTIME: The ultimate tool to optimize your business
whatisTektime.title: TekTIME is the innovative SaaS platform that simplifies the management of your organization. Designed especially for modern businesses, it allows you to easily manage your projects, meetings and training while effectively controlling your budgets and reducing the mental load of your teams.
whatisTektime.title1: TekTIME lets you see in real-time what everyone has completed, is
whatisTektime.title2: working on, and will prioritize next, cutting down on time wasted in
whatisTektime.title3: meetings and updates. Instead of feeling awkward and “micro-managey”
whatisTektime.title4: asking team members what they are working on or when will something be
whatisTektime.title5: done, managers can check the Team Schedule to view each member’s plan
whatisTektime.title6: and priorities. This transparency fosters accountability, boosts productivity,
whatisTektime.paragraph: With TekTIME, benefit from a clear framework, rigorous monitoring and a calm team. Our platform helps you control your expenses and guarantee the success of each of your projects.

percentage.p1: Employees believe that meetings are the biggest waste of time at work.
percentage.p2: Lost per year by companies due to ineffective meetings.
percentage.p3: Employees are burnt out, with 13% being severely burnt out.

track.title: Our main features:
track.title1: monitoring of their project thanks to a unique link
track.subtitle: ✅ Project management and planning: Structure your projects and ensure their success with precise monitoring.
track.subtitle2: ✅ Budget monitoring and resource optimization: Control every expense and improve the allocation of your financial and human resources.
track.subtitle3: ✅ Effective meeting organization: Make your meetings productive with optimized preparation, facilitation and follow-up.
track.subtitle4: ✅ Optimal training management: Maximize the impact of your training with precise and centralized monitoring.
track.subtitle5: ✅ Task Automation: Free up your time by automating reminders and repetitive tasks.
track.subtitle6: ✅ Centralization of information: Easily find all your documents and essential information in a single secure space.

assign.title: Concrete results with TekTIME:
assign.subtitle: Less time wasted and more efficiency
assign.subtitle2: A reduction in cognitive overload and stress
assign.subtitle3: Teams that are calmer and focused on tasks with high added value

make.title: To make the right decisions you need to have the right information
make.subtitle: TekTIME maximizes efficiency, eliminates busywork, creates visibility & accountability, and reduces stress for every team. TekTIME includes all of the tools you use to be productive and organized — in one place
make.subtitle1: TekTIME maximizes efficiency, eliminates busywork, creates visibility & accountability, and reduces stress for every team.
make.subtitle2: With fewer tools, less dispersion of your information
make.subtitle3: All the information in one place for smoother communication

list.text: We implemented TekTIME within Transeco2 to better track our salespeople's commercial presentations and get real feedback from interviews without possible interpretations. By integrating our sales journey, TekTIME has become a true daily tool.
list.author: Davy CHOUMILLE
list.title: Sales pipeline finally working

list.text: TekTIME not only decided to donate a percentage of its revenue but rationalized its approach to choosing the most effective charities. This evidence-based commitment testifies to their seriousness and sincere desire to have a lasting positive impact.
list.author: Romain Barbe
list.title: Growth that felt effortless

security.title: Bank-level security for your peace of mind
security.subtitle: Secure. Private. Encrypted. Your data is safe with us.

list.title: SOC2 Type 1
list.desc: We’ve completed SOC 2 Type 1 examination, independently audited for security, availability, and confidentiality.

list.title: Encryption
list.desc: Your emails are encrypted in transit and at rest using industry-leading protocols.

list.title: Enterprise-Grade Infrastructure
list.desc: Built on secure cloud infrastructure with 99.9% uptime and redundant backups.

list.title: Privacy First
list.desc: We never train AI models on your data. Your information stays yours and is never shared.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about the product and billing.

list.question: Is there a free trial available?
list.answer: Yes, you can try us for free for 8 days. If you want, we’ll provide you with a free, personalized 30-minute onboarding call to get you up and running as soon as possible.

list.question: Can I change my plan later?
list.answer: Of course. Our pricing scales with your company. Chat to our friendly team to find a solution that works for you.

list.question: What is your cancellation policy?
list.answer: We understand that things change. You can cancel your plan at any time and we’ll refund you the difference already paid.

list.question: Can other info be added to an invoice?
list.answer: Yes, you can add your VAT details or any other information effectively to your invoices from the billing section.

list.question: How does billing work?
list.answer: Plans are per workspace, not per account. You can upgrade one workspace, and still have any number of free workspaces.

list.question: How do I change my account email?
list.answer: You can change the email address associated with your account by going to your account settings.

integrations.title: Reclaim 90% of your email time
integrations.subtitle: Email in. Task done. Integrate your entire support stack.

pricing-discussions.title: Simple, Flexible Pricing
pricing-discussions.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your needs.

enterprise.title: Enterprise
enterprise.subtitle: For organizations that need scale and dedicated support. Best for 50+ team members.

streamlineMeeting.title: Ready to take action?
streamlineMeeting.description: You will have the compass that allows you to say what you do and do what you say

testimonials.title: TESTIMONIALS
testimonials.quote: We set up TekTIME within Transeco2 to better monitor the sales presentations of our salespeople and have real feedback from interviews without possible interpretations. By integrating our sales track, TekTIME has become a real daily tool.
testimonials.quote1: TekTIME not only decided to donate a percentage of its revenue, but streamlined its approach to choosing the most effective associations. This evidence-based commitment demonstrates their seriousness and sincere desire to make a lasting positive impact.
testimonials.author: Davy CHOUMILLE

welcome_message: Welcome to TekTIME. We are committed to protecting and respecting your privacy. This <br class="d-none d-md-block" />  privacy policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and protect your personal <br class="d-none d-md-block" />  information when you use our TekTIME SaaS software.
google_api_services_disclosure_text: TekTIME’s use and transfer to any other app of information received from Google APIs will adhere to the Google API Services User Data Policy, including the Limited Use requirements. Link to Google API Services User Data Policy.
information_we_collect_text: We collect several types of information for various uses to provide and improve our service to you.
personal_information_text: When you register with TekTIME, we may ask you to provide us with certain personally identifiable information which may include, but is not limited to:
log_data_text: We collect information that your browser sends whenever you visit our Service (“Log Data”). This Log Data may include information such as your computer's IP address, browser type, browser version, the pages of our Service that you visit, the time and date of your visit, the time spent on these pages, and other statistics.
use_google_list1: Our application, TekTIME Solutions, uses Google API Services to enhance user experience and provide relevant features. We adhere to the Google API Services User Data Policy and ensure that user data is handled securely and responsibly.
use_google_list2: For more information, please review the Google API Services User Data Policy at
google_calendar_data_text: To provide our services, we may request access to your Google Calendar. This includes viewing and managing your calendar events to ensure seamless integration and improved user experience within TekTIME. We use the following sensitive scopes:
usage_of_information_text: We use the information we collect in a variety of ways, including to:
sharing_your_information_text: We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties.
may_share_info: We may share your information in the following situations:
third_party: With third-party service providers to facilitate our Service, to provide the Service on our behalf, to perform Service-related services, or to assist us in analyzing how our Service is used.
legal: To comply with a legal obligation, to protect and defend our rights or property, to prevent or investigate possible wrong doing in connection with the Service, or to protect the personal safety of users of the Service or the public.
data_security_text: The security of your data is important to us. We implement security measures to protect your personal information. However, please note that no method of transmission over the Internet or method of electronic storage is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
your_rights_text: In accordance with the Data Protection Act and the GDPR, you have the following rights:
access: Access: You have the right to request a copy of the information we hold about you.
Rectification: Rectification: You have the right to request that we correct any information that you believe is inaccurate or incomplete.
Erasure: Erasure: You have the right to request the deletion of your personal data under certain conditions.
Opposition: Opposition: You have the right to object to the processing of your personal data under certain conditions.
Portability: Portability: You have the right to request that we transfer the data we have collected to another organization, or directly to you, under certain conditions.
Limitation: Limitation: You have the right to request the limitation of theprocessing of your personal data under certain conditions.
changes_to_privacy_policy_text: We may update our privacy policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new privacy policy on this page. You are advised to review this Privacy Policy periodically for any changes. Changes to this Privacy Policy are effective when posted on this page.
notifyOfChanges: Notify you of changes to our service
allowParticipation: Allow you to participate in the interactive features of our service when you wish
collectAnalytics: Collect analytics or valuable information so that we can improve our service
monitorUse: Monitor the use of our service
detectTechnicalProblems: Detect, prevent, and resolve technical problems
zoom_overview_description: TekTIME seamlessly integrates with Zoom to boost your project management efficiency. This guide provides step-by-step instructions on adding, using, and removing the Zoom integration.
adding_zoom_description1: Log in to your TekTIME account.
adding_zoom_description9: from the list of available integrations.
adding_zoom_description10: Follow the on-screen prompts to authenticate your Zoom account and grant the necessary permissions.
adding_zoom_description11: Once connected, your Zoom account details are securely stored and used solely to create and manage Zoom meetings within TekTIME.
navigate_the_project: Navigate to the project where you wish to create a meeting.
enable_zoom_integration1: On the meeting creation page, locate the checkbox labeled
link_your_zoom: Check this option to link your Zoom account for the current meeting.
enter_meeting_title: Enter your meeting title, date, time, and a brief description.
select_zoom_option: With the Zoom option selected, a Zoom meeting will be automatically generated and linked to the meeting details.
select_team_member: Select the team members who need to attend the meeting from your project roster.
participant_will_receive: Each participant will receive the Zoom meeting invitation and related details once the meeting is saved.
define_actionable_step: Define actionable steps or agenda items associated with the meeting.
assign_individual_participant: Assign these steps to individual participants to ensure clear responsibilities and effective follow-up.
meeting_will_now_setup: Your meeting will now be set up with an integrated Zoom session, and all participants will be notified accordingly.
login_to_tektime: Log in to your TekTIME account and go to the
locate_zoom_integration: tab and locate the Zoom integration.
click_remove_button: Click the Remove or Disconnect button and confirm your action.
disconnecting_will_stop: Disconnecting will stop further synchronization, though past meeting records remain available.

footer.desc: Streamline your meetings with our efficient scheduling and management tools. Create, update, and organize meetings with ease.

T&C.welcome: Welcome to TekTIME. By accessing and using our service, you agree to comply with these <br class="d-none d-md-block" />  terms of service. Please read them carefully.
T&C.acceptance_description: By creating an account and using TekTIME, you agree to be bound by these terms of service. If you do not accept these terms, you should not use our service.
T&C.user_account_description: To use TekTIME, you must create an account by providing accurate and complete information. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your password and for all activities that occur under your account. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.
T&C.license_use_description: Subject to your compliance with these terms, we grant you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, and revocable license to access and use TekTIME solely for your internal business needs.
usage_restrictions_list: Use TekTIME for any illegal or unauthorized purposes.
Violate any applicable local, national, or international laws.
Transmit any viruses or any destructive code.
Attempt to bypass any security measures of TekTIME.
Reproduce, duplicate, copy, sell, resell, or exploit any part of TekTIME without our express written permission.
T&C.content_ownership_sub_heading_4: 4.1.4 Prohibition of Illegal or Inappropriate Content
T&C.content_ownership_description: You retain all ownership rights to the content you create or upload on TekTIME. By uploading content, you grant us a worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free, transferable, and sublicensable license to use, reproduce, modify, adapt, publish, and display this content as part of providing TekTIME.
T&C.content_ownership_description_2: By creating, submitting or sharing content on TekTIME, you grant us a worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free, transferable license, with the possibility of sublicensing, to use, host, reproduce, modify, distribute, publicly display, and create derivative works of your content, solely for the purpose of providing and improving the TekTIME services. This license is necessary to enable us to provide our services to you (for example, to enable storage of your documents and sharing with your colleagues or partners).
T&C.content_ownership_description_3: You are solely responsible for the content you submit, share or display on TekTIME. You represent and warrant that you have all necessary rights, or have obtained all necessary permissions, to submit such content to TekTIME and to grant the rights set forth in this section. We cannot be held responsible for any content you submit, store or share via TekTIME.
T&C.content_ownership_description_4: You agree not to submit, share or display content that is unlawful, defamatory, hateful, obscene, or otherwise inappropriate, or that violates the intellectual property rights of others. We reserve the right to remove any content that violates these terms, at our sole discretion and without notice.
T&C.content_ownership_description_5: You can delete your content from TekTIME at any time. However, in some cases, some copies of your content may remain visible if they have been shared with other users and not deleted by them. Additionally, we may retain certain information as required by law or for backup and archival purposes.
T&C.content_ownership_description_6: If you believe that content available on TekTIME violates your intellectual property rights, we invite you to contact us immediately at angel@tektime.io. We will investigate all claims of copyright infringement in accordance with our procedures and applicable laws.
T&C.content_responsibility_description: You are solely responsible for the content you upload or create on TekTIME. We reserve the right to remove or disable access to any content that we, in our discretion, find in violation of these terms or any applicable law.
T&C.pricing_description: The use of certain features of TekTIME may be subject to fees. You agree to pay all applicable fees for your use of TekTIME according to the rates in effect at the time of your use.
T&C.billing_description: We will issue invoices for incurred fees, and you agree to pay them within the specified time. In case of non-payment, we reserve the right to suspend or terminate your access to TekTIME.
T&C.privacy_description: Your use of TekTIME is also governed by our privacy policy, which explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
T&C.termination_description: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your access to TekTIME at any time, with or without notice, for any violation of these terms or for any other reason we deem appropriate. You may also terminate your account at any time by contacting us.
T&C.limitation_liability_description: To the fullest extent permitted by law, we disclaim all liability for any direct, indirect, incidental, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of TekTIME. Our total liability to you for any claim arising from the use of TekTIME will be limited to the amount you have paid, if any, to access TekTIME.
T&C.changes_terms_description: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new terms on our website. Your continued use of TekTIME after the posting of changes constitutes your acceptance of the new terms.
T&C.governing_law_description: These terms are governed by the laws of France. Any dispute arising from these terms or the use of TekTIME will be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the French courts.

NewsletterT&C.terms_conditions: Terms and Conditions of Subscription to the TekTIME Newsletter
NewsletterT&C.welcome: By checking this box, you agree that TekTIME collects and processes your personal data in accordance with applicable laws and regulations, including the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). You expressly consent to the following information being used to send you newsletters and communications relating to TekTIME products, services, and events.
NewsletterT&C.acceptance_description_1: First and last name: This information is collected to personalize communications and send you messages in a more friendly way.
NewsletterT&C.acceptance_description_2: Email address: It is collected to send you the TekTIME newsletter.
NewsletterT&C.acceptance_description_3: Post: This information allows us to better understand your profile and personalize content according to your professional interests.
NewsletterT&C.acceptance_description_4: Purpose of processing: The data collected through this form is used only to allow TekTIME users to create and send their own newsletter to their customers or professional contacts. More precisely, the processing purposes are as follows :
NewsletterT&C.acceptance_description_5: Allow users to personalize and structure their newsletters using the TekTIME platform.
NewsletterT&C.acceptance_description_6: Ensure the proper management and sending of newsletters by TekTIME users to their own customers or contacts.
NewsletterT&C.acceptance_description_7: Facilitate tracking of communications sent by users via TekTIME, so that users can improve the content and relevance of their newsletters.
NewsletterT&C.acceptance_description_8: By subscribing to a newsletter generated via TekTIME, you agree that the information you provide (surname, first name, email address, position) will be used only for the receipt of this newsletter, and under no circumstances for other purposes not related to this service.
NewsletterT&C.acceptance_description_9.1: Under the GDPR, you have the following rights regarding your
NewsletterT&C.acceptance_description_2.1: Right of access: You can request access to the data we hold about you.
NewsletterT&C.acceptance_description_2.2: Right of rectification: You can request the correction of any inaccurate or incomplete information.
NewsletterT&C.acceptance_description_2.3: Right of deletion: You can request the deletion of your personal data at any time.
NewsletterT&C.acceptance_description_2.4: Right to restriction of processing: You can request to limit the use of your data under certain conditions.
NewsletterT&C.acceptance_description_2.5: Right to data portability: You have the right to receive your personal data in a structured, commonly used and machine-readable format.
NewsletterT&C.acceptance_description_2.6: Right to object: You can object at any time to the use of your personal data for sending the newsletter.
NewsletterT&C.acceptance_description_2.7: To exercise your rights, you can contact us at the following address : angel@tektime.io.
NewsletterT&C.acceptance_description_3.1: You can withdraw your consent at any time by clicking on the unsubscribe link in every email we send you or by contacting us directly at angel@tektime.io. Withdrawing your consent will not affect the lawfulness of processing based on prior consent.
NewsletterT&C.acceptance_description_4.1: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized use, loss, destruction or disclosure.
NewsletterT&C.acceptance_description_5.1: Your personal data is stored and processed only in infrastructures located within the European Economic Area (EEA). We do not transfer your data outside the EEA unless we have appropriate safeguards in place
NewsletterT&C.acceptance_description_6.1: The data controller is TekTIME. For any questions regarding the protection of your personal data, you can contact us at angel@tektime.io.

about_tektime_description: At TekTIME, we believe that real change starts with ourselves and concrete actions in our daily lives. By valuing time as our most precious resource, we strive to make a meaningful impact and bring quality and value to everything we do. Through changing our own world, we aim to make a difference in the world at large.
change_world: Change the world, one step at a time

wayOfSupporting.title: OUR WAY OF SUPPORTING YOU
wayOfSupporting.subtitle: Our approach is based on four  <br class="d-none d-md-block" />  essential pillars that we call the 4COs

communication.title: Communication
communication.description: Communication is at the heart of everything we do. We believe that good communication helps create strong and lasting relationships. Together, we exchange, share and build a harmonious and productive work environment.

collaboration.title: Collaboration
collaboration.description: Collaboration is the key to our success. At TekTIME, we encourage teamwork and cooperation. By joining forces and skills, we can accomplish extraordinary things and achieve ambitious goals.

confidence.title: Trust
confidence.description: Trust is the foundation of any successful relationship. We make it a point of honor to create a climate of trust where everyone feels valued and respected. Mutual trust allows us to work peacefully and achieve our common goals.

coaching.title: Coaching
coaching.description: Coaching is essential for personal and professional development. At TekTIME, we support our employees and our customers to help them realize their full potential. Together, we continually grow and evolve.

ProcessAndProductivity.title: Process and productivity management
ProcessAndProductivity.description: Enhance team collaboration and efficiency with integrated project management solutions

one.heading: Problematic
one.description: Standardize processes for rigorous monitoring and avoid errors, delays, and inefficiencies. 70% of companies face challenges in process documentation and standardization.

two.heading: Solution
two.description: Create detailed templates for business processes, documenting key steps, responsibilities, and deadlines for easier implementation.

three.heading: results
three.description: Establish clear and consistent business process templates. Your team will reduce errors, close performance gaps, and improve meeting productivity, leading to better organization, focus, and time savings for other important tasks.

teamboost.description: Empower your team to be more effective and productive

one.heading: Problematic
one.description: As a project manager, you aim to optimize planning and monitoring for timely success. With 80% of projects exceeding budget or deadlines (PMI), effective management is crucial to avoid financial losses and underperformance.

two.heading: Solution
two.description: Create project templates with sections for goals, task planning, resource tracking, and result evaluation.

three.heading: results
three.description: Customizable project templates to standardize methods, boost team communication, and ensure on-time success. Benefits include better communication, transparency, access to information, decision-making, and collaboration.

one.heading: Problematic
one.description: Professionals often struggle with reduced concentration and distractions, impacting productivity. A Harvard Business Review study shows the Pomodoro method can boost productivity by up to 25% by minimizing distractions and enhancing focus.

two.heading: Solution
two.description: TekTIME's integrated Pomodoro timer helps individuals manage time effectively, promoting concentration and productivity through short work intervals and breaks.

three.heading: results
three.description: Using the Pomodoro Method with TekTIME, professionals maximize work time, reduce interruptions, and maintain concentration, saving time and reducing mental fatigue.

ProcessAndProductivity.title: Collaboration and communication
ProcessAndProductivity.description: Streamline team meetings, manage invitations seamlessly, and automate reporting for enhanced collaboration and efficiency.

one.heading: Problematic
one.description: Unstructured meetings hinder the effectiveness of work rituals, with 65% of agile teams reporting decreased productivity and motivation (Scrum.org).

two.heading: Solution
two.description: With timer and real-time note-taking, facilitators can structure and time each meeting stage for maximum effectiveness.

three.heading: Results
three.description: TekTIME helps managers optimize team exchanges, reduce meeting time, enhance communication, and improve post-meeting follow-up, easing mental load.

teamboost.description: Empower your team to be more effective and productive

one.heading: Problematic
one.description: Incomplete or poorly structured invitations often cause confusion and wasted preparation time for professionals.

two.heading: Solution
two.description: TekTIME provides structured business invitations with clear agendas and objectives, plus action tracking and reporting for effective preparation and participation.

three.heading: Results
three.description: TekTIME helps guests prepare quickly and efficiently, reducing stress and improving meeting performance and collaboration.

one.heading: Problematic
one.description: Professionals often struggle with meeting follow-ups and note-taking, leading to lost information and challenges in implementing decisions.

two.heading: Solution
two.description: TekTIME provides personalized, automatic meeting minutes, action tracking, and decision management to streamline implementation.

three.heading: Results
three.description: TekTIME automates minute-taking, saving time and ensuring important information is captured and shared for better collaboration and results.

ProcessAndProductivity.title: HR management
ProcessAndProductivity.description: TekTime enhances HR management by streamlining employee onboarding and facilitating effective knowledge transfer.

one.heading: Problematic
one.description: As an expert in your field, you worry that essential knowledge will be lost if you leave unexpectedly. According to Harvard Business Review, 60% of companies see the truck factor (over-reliance on one person) as a major challenge in knowledge management.

two.heading: Solution
two.description: With TekTIME's HEROES offer, you can create comprehensive training templates that capture all essential information and procedures, reducing the truck factor risk.

three.heading: Results
three.description: Your team now has access to detailed and always accessible templates, ensuring continuity of operations in your absence. This leads to a significant reduction in employee turnover, lower recruitment costs, increased productivity, and better talent retention.

teamboost.description: Empower your team to be more effective and productive

one.heading: Problematic
one.description: Defects in the onboarding process cause time loss and reduced productivity, demoralizing newcomers. A Glassdoor study shows nearly 30% of new employees quit within the first 90 days due to poor onboarding.

two.heading: Solution
two.description: TekTIME allows you to create personalized onboarding templates covering administrative info, training, resources, and key contacts.

three.heading: Results
three.description: TekTIME provides clear and structured onboarding, improving efficiency and engagement. HR managers benefit from a standardized process, spending less time on administration and more on supporting new hires.

ProcessAndProductivity.title: Customer relationship management
ProcessAndProductivity.description: TekTIME offers effective customer follow-up and robust contacts networking.

one.heading: Problematic
one.description: Professionals often lack structure and method in their learning process, needing personalized support to achieve their goals. A LinkedIn survey shows 94% of professionals would follow training with personalized support and regular monitoring.

two.heading: Solution
two.description: TekTIME provides a structured framework and personalized monitoring during training and coaching sessions. Real-time note-taking and a timer ensure efficient time management and documentation of progress.

three.heading: Results
three.description: TekTIME helps professionals achieve their goals faster and develop skills more effectively with structured, personalized support, reducing the mental load of managing progress and objectives.

teamboost.description: Empower your team to be more effective and productive

one.heading: Problematic
one.description: Professionals often miss opportunities and struggle with managing contacts, leading to difficulty in maintaining successful relationships.

two.heading: Solution
two.description: TekTIME offers an integrated contact management system, including business card management and interaction tracking to streamline communication and collaboration.

three.heading: Results
three.description: Save time with automatic information capture and sharing, strengthen relationships, and enhance networking opportunities for better professional growth.

warnings.outside_working_hours: This meeting is scheduled outside your working hours ({{date}} {{time}}). Do you want to proceed anyway?

google_oauth_scopes_disclosure_intro: Our application uses Google APIs to enhance your experience. Below is an explanation of the Google OAuth scopes we request, why we need them, and how we handle the data.
scope_userinfo_email: Used to access your primary email address to identify your Google account.
scope_userinfo_profile: Used to access your public profile information, such as your name and profile picture.
scope_openid: Used to authenticate your identity using OpenID Connect.
scope_calendar: Full access to your calendars. We use this to create, modify, and delete calendar events. No calendar data is shared with third parties.
scope_calendar_events: Used to sync our application's events with your Google Calendar. Only event metadata is used.
scope_calendar_list_readonly: Allows us to list your calendars so you can choose where to sync or display events.
scope_calendar_calendars: Lets us manage calendar properties and create new secondary calendars on your behalf.
scope_calendar_app_created: Grants access to calendars specifically created by our application, helping keep data organized.
data_usage_storage_text: We use your Google data solely for providing core features of our app. We do not share this data with third parties. Stored data is securely handled and only kept as long as needed.
google_api_policy_reference_text: Our use of information received from Google APIs adheres to the <1>Google API Services User Data Policy</1>, including the Limited Use requirements.
agendaTooltip: Displays all your meetings and planned tasks in a visual calendar format.
listTooltip: Switch to list view to see all your tasks and meetings sorted by date.
draftTooltip: Find here your saved but not yet validated meetings or tasks.
createMomentBtnTooltip: Create a new meeting or task with all necessary details.
quickMomentBtnTooltip: Add a meeting or task in a few seconds, without filling out the full form.
syncBtnTooltip: Reloads the data to display the latest changes or additions.
googleAgendaTooltip: Synchronize or hide events from your Google Calendar.
outlookAgendaTooltip: Synchronize or hide events from your Outlook Calendar.
tektimeAgendaTooltip: Enable or disable the display of your TekTIME agenda
monthTooltip: Displays the whole month to get an overview of your activities.
weekTooltip: Displays only the current week for better priority management
dailyTooltip: Displays only the current day for better priority management
prevBtnTooltip: Go back to the previous period (week or month depending on the selected view).
nextBtnTooltip: Move forward to the next period (week or month depending on the selected view).

landingPage.footerTitle: Simplify your time management and optimize your performance. TekTIME is with you every day.
landingPage.newsletterText: Join our community and discover how TekTIME transforms teamwork.

hero.desc1: A ready-to-use AI solution to help freelancers and managers of very small and small businesses save time and

ecosystem.title1: Your platform in the form of online software
ecosystem.desc1: I'm your personal assistant—the one who helps you organize your time, projects, and meetings effortlessly.
ecosystem.desc2: I centralize everything: your schedule, your missions, your team, your clients, your actions and your processes.
ecosystem.desc3: With me, you gain clarity, collaboration and serenity.
ecosystem.desc4: I make sure that nothing escapes you and that every minute counts.
ecosystem.desc5: TekTime.io helps users easily connect their Google Calendar to schedule and manage meetings automatically. Our platform syncs your availability in real-time, creates calendar events instantly, and keeps all your appointments organized — directly from your TekTime dashboard.
ecosystem.desc6: We use Google OAuth only for secure sign-in and to synchronize your calendar events.

provenNumbers.title: Proven Numbers
provenNumbers.desc: The results I have already helped to achieve

card1.title: Workload Saved
card1.desc: Fewer manual tasks, more focus on real added value.

card2.title: Optimized Budget
card2.desc: Clear budget tracking and real-time billing prevent hidden losses.

card3.title: Schedule Compliance
card3.desc: With a clear roadmap and real-time tracking, your projects finally stay on schedule.

card4.title: Client Satisfaction
card4.desc: Automatic reports and total transparency strengthen trust.

scaleBrand.title: Ready to take back control of your time?
scaleBrand.desc: With TekTIME, we can determine what is wasting your time and find the ideal solution.
scaleBrand.desc2: Already adopted by freelancers, agencies and SMEs who want to gain efficiency.

card1.title: Calendar management
card1.subtitle: I organize your time intelligently and give you control over all your activities.
card1.l1: Automatically schedule your meetings and tasks
card1.l2: Synchronize with your calendar and your team
card1.l3: Smart alerts so you don't forget anything

card2.title: Project management
card2.subtitle: I watch over your projects like a co-pilot always by your side.
card2.l1: I alert you as soon as a budget or deadline slips
card2.l2: I synchronize your schedule, your missions and your team
card2.l3: I calculate the gaps between planned and actual, in real time
card2.l4: I help you stay on track to deliver on time and within your budget.

card3.title: I monitor your clients, contacts and teams
card3.l1: I centralize your contacts, service providers and clients
card3.l2: I memorize your exchanges for smooth and intelligent follow-up
card3.l3: I coordinate your team's schedules in real time
card3.l4: I facilitate collaboration between colleagues and partners
card3.l5: I offer you a clear view of your network and the load of each one

card4.title: Task Tracking
card4.subtitle: I plan your tasks for you.
card4.l1: I organize your tasks by priority, team, or project.
card4.l2: I show you the real-time progress of every mission.
card4.l3: I link each action to your schedule and budget.
card4.l4: I send smart reminders to keep everything moving smoothly.

card5.title: Messaging & Support
card5.subtitle: I centralize all your conversations so nothing gets lost.
card5.l1: I gather your internal and external communications in one place.
card5.l2: I help you reply faster with a clear and organized message history.
card5.l3: I turn messages into actions or support tickets in one click.
card5.l4: I alert your team when a client needs help.

card6.title: Processes & SOPs
card6.subtitle: I keep your methods structured, clear, shared, and reusable.
card6.l1: I centralize all your processes and standard operating procedures in one place.
card6.l2: I turn your best practices into ready-to-use templates.
card6.l3: I help standardize your team’s actions for greater efficiency.
card6.l4: I make knowledge sharing between team members easy.
card6.l5: I ensure project continuity, even when teams change.

solution.desc: See how we’ve helped brands grow and succeed.

card1.title: Meeting with automatic note taking
card1.desc: Use AI to turn your meetings into clear, actionable notes.

work.title: How TekTIME Helps You Save Time
work.desc: Our approach is simple: centralize, automate, and streamline your activities. Here’s how TekTIME transforms your workdays.

step1.title: Agenda
step1.desc: Manage your meetings and activities seamlessly — from preparation to facilitation and follow-up, all in a collaborative way.

step2.title: Missions
step2.desc: Stay in control of your projects: roadmap, scheduling, actions, resources, budget, workload, and billing — all in one place.

step3.title: Casting
step3.desc: Track your team’s entire activity: manage members, schedules, clients, and contacts from a single dashboard.

step4.title: Actions
step4.desc: Never miss a thing — automated action management takes care of everything for you.

step5.title: Solutions
step5.desc: Optimize your processes with templates, truck factor management, and centralized content.

review1.title: Sales pipeline finally working.
review1.desc: We implemented TekTIME at Transeco2 to better track our sales presentations and get real feedback from meetings — without any room for misinterpretation. By integrating it into our sales process, TekTIME has become a truly essential everyday tool.

review2.title: Growth that felt effortless.
review2.desc: TekTIME not only chose to donate a portion of its revenue but also streamlined its approach to select the most effective organizations. This evidence-based commitment reflects their professionalism and genuine desire to make a lasting positive impact. Their smart funnel optimization brought clarity, focus, and speed — we quickly saw a 40% increase in qualified signups without raising our ad spend.

values.title: Our Values
values.desc: TekTIME is more than just a management tool — it’s a philosophy: working better, together, with peace of mind.

value1.title: Collaboration
value1.desc: We act together — a single space to prepare, manage, and follow up on your team’s activities.

value2.title: Communication
value2.desc: We talk together — a centralized channel that streamlines your exchanges with no loss of information.

value3.title: Cohesion
value3.desc: We move forward together — a structured framework that aligns your teams and projects in the same direction.

value4.title: Trust
value4.desc: We stand together — built-in GDPR security and compliance ensure your data is protected and your clients reassured.

pricing.title: Simple and Flexible Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your needs.

lawyers_tool.title: TekTIME – The Confidential Tool for Lawyers
lawyers_tool.subtitle: Automatic note-taking and reports · Real-time billing · Absolute respect for professional secrecy
lawyers_tool.story_text: “Every meeting, every call, every appointment used to generate scattered notes and reports to write in a hurry. With TekTIME, everything is automated: my notes become a clear, structured, and secure report. The result: no more wasted time, my files are flawless, and confidentiality is preserved.”

features.notes_text: Each discussion is captured and turned into a clear, dated, and organized report. A reliable memory for your cases with no extra effort.
features.planning_text: Hearings, meetings, procedural deadlines — everything is centralized and synchronized to avoid oversights.
features.files_text: Documents and pleadings stored in an encrypted space. Your data remains confidential and accessible only to you.
features.budget_text: See the balance between time spent and fees earned. Clear and rigorous financial management.
features.billing_text: Every minute worked is recorded and integrated directly into your fees. No more time-consuming reconstructions.
features.casting_text: Follow key steps in your cases and easily coordinate clients, colleagues, and experts.

lawyers_tool.confidentiality_text: TekTIME is designed with strict respect for professional secrecy. All your data is encrypted and protected. Only you have access to your notes, cases, and billing — a fundamental requirement for practicing with peace of mind.
lawyers_tool.cta_text: A sober, reliable, and confidential tool, designed for lawyers.
